OPERATION.COMMENT: !!! OPTIONAL !!! save original values of attributes that will be changed; should only be run on unassigned network
flag nodes on met net links
set type number to 51 for approach VDF

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set AM Peak Link Capacities

OPERATION.COMMENT: filter for all metered ramps and links
reset ramp type numbers to original values
set ramp capacity assuming no meter
reset ramp lengths to actual values
set type number to 71 for metered ramp VDF
set type number to 61 for CBD grid VDF
multiply hourly capacity by number of hours in period (x2 for AM)
multiply approach capacity by number of hours in period (x2 for AM)
multiply midblock capacity by number of hours in period (x2 for AM)
set AddVal2 = Period AppCap for custom approach function
set AddVal3 = Period MBCap for custom approach function
zero out capacity on deactivated links

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set AM Peak Toll Time Values

OPERATION.COMMENT: Average AM Volume MSA with AM Volume Iter N
Average MD Volume MSA with OP Volume Iter N
Calculate AM MSA TT for Skimming (AddVal1)
Calculate MD MSA TT for Skimming (AddVal2)
Save vol_msa fields for next iteration
TEMP USING Implementation Plan Cap + EMME_DATA3*2 for Freeways

OPERATION.RESULTMESSAGE: The assignment reached convergence after 126 of a maximum of 200 iterations with GAP of 9.93659179e-04.

OPERATION.COMMENT: TEMP USING Implementation Plan Cap + EMME_DATA3 for Freeways
Set Default Times, LINKSERIAL, and TSysSet on Links + Connectors
Set run and dwell times for transit
Set run and dwell times for transit
